    for (x in 0..MAX_VAL) {

    }


    // DP state: dp[v] stores the count of valid prefixes ending with value v.

        val V_curr = local_V_S[s_curr]
        
        // Two-pointer approach for prefix sums

        var j = 0 // Pointer for V_prev

        for (v_curr in V_curr) {
            // Accumulate counts from V_prev such that v_prev <= v_curr
            while (j < V_prev.size && V_prev[j] <= v_curr) {
                val v_prev = V_prev[j]

                current_sum = (current_sum + dp_prev[v_prev]) % MOD
                j++

            dp_curr[v_curr] = current_sum
        }

    for (v in 0..MAX_VAL) {
        total_count = (total_count + dp_prev[v]) % MOD
    }

    return total_count
}
